prompt.body:
## Goal

The shipped references and repo docs teach the shadow seat and the bench — consolidated into existing sections, grammars cited from code, never restated.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `skills/factory/references/pipeline.md` SHALL gain the shadow-seat section (dark-by-default env keys, the inert record grammars by citation, a shadow failure never fails a build) and the bench section (attended tool; corpus → sealed replay → deterministic grading → report; the seal rule; the grading caveat; never contending with the live line).
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` (factory repo) SHALL gain the conventions: the bench record schemas, the two env keys, and the rule that no PR trail comment ever carries a line-anchored `VERDICT:`.
- [ ] `deploy/DISPATCH.md` SHALL state that the shadow keys ride the dispatch service environment, dark by default, operator-set (auth is human work).
- [ ] Every addition SHALL consolidate into existing sections — no new doc file, no restated grammar (cite the defining code by path).
- [ ] The full suite SHALL be green; no new dependencies.

## Context & links

Slice G of epic yellow-robots/factory#161 — the technical-rfc on that epic's body carries the integration points, patterns, hidden contracts, and the citation pin at `cc63523`; the governing product-spec (draft until the human's spec-ready) is summarized there too — this issue alone is enough to implement. Ruling-dependency: this slice states the spec's PROPOSED arms (the epic body names rulings (a)/(b)/(c)); a veto at spec-ready amends this body before any Ready flip.

`skills/factory/references/pipeline.md`: the shadow seat (dark-by-default, the env keys, the inert record grammars, a shadow failure never fails a build) and the bench (attended tool, corpus→sealed replay→deterministic grading→report, the seal rule, the grading caveat) — each section citing the grammar definitions in code rather than restating them. `AGENTS.md` (factory repo): the conventions additions — bench record schemas, the two env keys, the never-a-line-anchored-`VERDICT:` rule for trail comments. `deploy/DISPATCH.md`: one paragraph — the shadow keys ride the dispatch service environment, dark by default, and are operator-set (auth is human work). Keep every addition consolidated into the existing sections — no new doc files; docs are consolidated, not accreted.

## Test expectations

The independent tester verifies: docs-only diff; every cited path and env key exists in the tree as documented; no new doc files; the version-pin test untouched and green.

## Constraints / out of scope

Docs only — no tool or runner changes; the factory-map (vault) update is the close session's ship-walk, not this PR; no new dependencies.

## Size

S — one PR
